member.name: T:EvmHookSpec
member.summary:
Shared specifications for an EVM hook.

This class defines the source of EVM bytecode for a hook implementation. Currently, hooks can only be implemented by referencing an existing contract that implements the extension point API.

member.name: M:EvmHookSpec.#ctor(ContractId)
member.summary: Create a new EvmHookSpec that references a contract.
member.param: the ID of the contract that implements the hook

member.name: P:EvmHookSpec.ContractId
member.summary: Get the contract ID that implements this hook.
